calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-16-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ashley Huh appeared via zoom for Gwendolyn Lam (petitoner).

Counsel stated that Mr. Lam has waived notice of the peition. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Continued To Sep-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

Off Calendar Jul-28-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Perotti appeared by zoom for petitioner.

The court stated that it received information on the parent of each nephew, that it has a verification for the supplemental declaration and that everything looks good. The court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Gwendolyn Lam is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for July 28, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Frank Mahoney, III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
